meta.title: Rule of 2 — One Card to Come
meta.description: Use the Rule of 2 to estimate probabilities with one card to come.

blocks.content:
## Rule of 2 — One Card to Come

You're on the turn with one card to come. Multiply your outs by 2 to estimate your probability of hitting. This shortcut is surprisingly accurate and will serve you well at the table!

blocks.title: Rule of 2 Drill
blocks.instructions: You are on the turn (one card to come). Given the number of outs, use the Rule of 2 to estimate the probability of completing your draw.
